collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (5 total Queries, 5 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `e`.`pk_enrollment`, `e`.`group_name`, `e`.`subject`, `tp`.`person` as `profesor_nombre`, `tp`.`first_name` as `profesor_first`, `tp`.`last_name` as `profesor_last`, `ta`.`person` as `alumno_nombre`, `ta`.`first_name` as `alumno_first`, `ta`.`last_name` as `alumno_last` FROM `tbl_enrollment` `e` JOIN `tbl_users` `up` ON `up`.`pk_user` = `e`.`fk_teacher_user` JOIN `tbl_persons` `tp` ON `tp`.`pk_phone` = `up`.`fk_phone` JOIN `tbl_users` `ua` ON `ua`.`pk_user` = `e`.`fk_student_user` JOIN `tbl_persons` `ta` ON `ta`.`pk_phone` = `ua`.`fk_phone`

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `e`.`pk_enrollment`, `e`.`group_name`, `e`.`subject`, `tp`.`person` as `profesor_nombre`, `tp`.`first_name` as `profesor_first`, `tp`.`last_name` as `profesor_last`, `ta`.`person` as `alumno_nombre`, `ta`.`first_name` as `alumno_first`, `ta`.`last_name` as `alumno_last` FROM `tbl_enrollment` `e` JOIN `tbl_users` `up` ON `up`.`pk_user` = `e`.`fk_teacher_user` JOIN `tbl_persons` `tp` ON `tp`.`pk_phone` = `up`.`fk_phone` JOIN `tbl_users` `ua` ON `ua`.`pk_user` = `e`.`fk_student_user` JOIN `tbl_persons` `ta` ON `ta`.`pk_phone` = `ua`.`fk_phone`
